name: HAIR AND HOUNDS
subtitle: Pet Grooming · Dog & Cat Spa
tagline: Gentle, fear-free grooming for dogs and cats in Bristol — calm hands, tidy coats, happy pets.
pageTitle: HAIR AND HOUNDS — Pet Grooming in Bristol

services.name: Full Groom
services.desc: Wash, dry, full clip or scissor cut, nails, ears and a bow.

services.name: Bath & Tidy
services.desc: For in-between visits — clean coat, face and paws neatened.

services.name: Puppy Intro
services.desc: Gentle first visits so little ones learn the salon is safe.

services.name: Nail & Paw
services.desc: Nail trim and paw balm — quick, no fuss, no stress.

services.name: De-shed
services.desc: Undercoat blow-out for the heavy moult seasons. Your hoover will thank you.

services.name: Spa Package
services.desc: Full groom plus blueberry facial, pawdicure and a bandana.

about.title: Grooming without the stress.
paragraphs: Hair and Hounds opened after years of watching nervous pets dread the groomer. We built the opposite.
Dogs and cats are handled separately, sessions are calm and unrushed, and anxious animals get all the time they need.
We’d rather take longer and send a relaxed pet home than rush a frightened one out the door.

whyChoose.text: Fear-free handling — anxious pets welcome, no rush
Dogs and cats kept separate and calm throughout
Fully insured, trained groomers with first-aid know-how

reviews.name: Lucy T.
reviews.text: My rescue terrier used to shake at the door. Now he trots in. That says everything.

reviews.name: Ben R.
reviews.text: Cat grooming done properly — separated from dogs, super gentle. Thank you.

reviews.name: Amara O.
reviews.text: Spa package for our old lab and she came home glowing. Worth every penny.
